name: AI-SDLC Platform IDE Plugin
description: Complete intelligent SDLC automation in IDE chat. Supports 15-stage workflow from requirements to incident response with natural language + slash commands.
author: Mehul Dedhia & your-ado-org

skills.name: requirement-intake
skills.description: Capture requirements and create work items

skills.name: prd-review
skills.description: Review PRD for gaps and completeness

skills.name: grooming
skills.description: Break down features into master and sprint stories

skills.name: architecture-review
skills.description: Review architecture feasibility and create ADRs

skills.name: system-design
skills.description: Design data models, APIs, and deployment strategy

skills.name: sprint-planning
skills.description: Plan sprint with task breakdown and team assignment

skills.name: implementation
skills.description: Provide development guidance and track progress

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Review code for quality, security, and standards

skills.name: test-design
skills.description: Design QA tests and create test cases

skills.name: performance-testing
skills.description: Run load tests and validate NFR targets

skills.name: staging-validation
skills.description: Deploy to staging and collect sign-offs

skills.name: deployment
skills.description: Deploy to production with canary rollout

skills.name: setup
skills.description: One-command setup: installs deps, creates env, wires commands, validates MCP

agents.name: orchestrator-agent
agents.description: Intelligent workflow orchestrator for multi-stage SDLC automation

agents.name: nl-processor
agents.description: Natural language command processor with pattern matching

mcp_servers.name: ado
mcp_servers.description: Azure DevOps integration (work items, comments, tags)

hooks.name: context-loader
hooks.description: Extract context from chat messages (story ID, command, role)

required_env_vars.name: ADO_PAT
required_env_vars.description: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token (get from ADO User Settings)

model_tier.description: Default model for skill execution (haiku, sonnet, opus)

memory_path.description: Path to .sdlc/memory directory for context persistence

canary_percentage.description: Default canary rollout percentage for deployments

prompts.welcome:
Welcome to the AI-SDLC Platform! Use `/project:requirement-intake` to get started, or ask me anything about your product development.

Available commands:
- `/project:requirement-intake` — Capture new requirements
- `/project:prd-review AB#123` — Review PRD for gaps
- `/project:grooming AB#123` — Break down stories
- `/project:architecture-review AB#123` — Design architecture
- `/project:system-design AB#123` — Create data model & APIs

Or just describe what you need in plain English!
prompts.help:
AI-SDLC Platform provides 15 automated SDLC stages:

**Planning & Design** (stages 1-5):
- Requirement Intake → PRD Review → Story Grooming → Architecture Review → System Design

**Development & QA** (stages 6-9):
- Sprint Planning → Implementation → Code Review → Test Design

**Validation & Release** (stages 10-15):
- Performance Testing → Staging Validation → Release Prep → Deployment → Monitoring → Incident Response

Use `/project:<stage-name>` or describe what you need naturally.

npm_packages.name: axios
npm_packages.description: HTTP client for Azure DevOps API calls

file_structure.skills/: Individual skill implementations (one per SDLC stage)

setup_instructions: See README.md for complete setup guide
